prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PARANECK-KNIFE-BLACK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical 6" Survival Knife with Sheath 550 Paracord Wrapped Handle Full Tang Drop Point Fixed Blade, Black Description: Be prepared for any situation with these Survival Paracord Wrapped Neck Chain Knives.

Measuring in at only 6" long, these neck chain knives make for a perfect protection blade. They each feature a stainless steel fixed blade as well as a razor sharp edge.

In addition, each of these knives comes wrapped with highly durable survival 550 paracord, which can be unraveled from the handle at any time in order to assist in an emergency situation.

These blades also come with an impact resistant sheath that allows for quick release, so you'll have easy access to your blade at all times. Each sheath comes attached to a sturdy black neck chain to hang conveniently around your neck or out of your pocket.

Don't get caught without one of these handy paracord wrapped neck knives.

Colors Available: Black & Neon Green Search Terms: outdoor camping fixed blade full tang survival knife hard sheath cold camp stainless steel wildness survivalist EE kit Features: - Stainless Steel Fixed Blade | Razor Sharp Edge - Impact Resistant Sheath Allows for Quick Release | Survival 500 Paracord Wrapped Handle - Fits Comfortably in Either Hand - Overall Length: 6" | Length of Blade: 3" | Neck Chain Length: 12" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 6" Black Survival Paracord Neck Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Fixed Blade, Full Tang, Stainless Steel, 550 Paracord Wrapped Handle, Impact Resistant Sheath, Neck Chain

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Fixed Blade, 550 Paracord Handle, Quick Release Sheath, Full Tang, Neck Chain Carry
